name: Crock Pot Cheese Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes in their skins until partially cooked; cool, peel, and grate.
2. Divide the grated potatoes into three equal portions.
3. In a large, round crockpot, layer one portion of grated potatoes, salt, and pepper, half a stick of butter cut into pat shapes, and 1 cup shredded cheese.
4. Repeat step 3 two more times with the remaining potato portions.
5. Pour milk over the layered mixture.
6. Cover and cook on Medium heat for 2 1/2 hours. For the last 1/2 hour, switch to High heat.
